Chat Edit: 'I understand you want to focus on the core IDE functionality first before adding AI agent features. Let me examine your current IDE structure and identify what needs work.

3 files read
index.html
main.js
ide-core.js
Looking at your current IDE structure, I can see several areas that need work before integrating AI agents with the 36 compilers. Let me identify the key issues and create a focused improvement plan:

Current IDE Issues Identified:
Missing Core Dependencies : The IDE references many components that aren't loaded

Incomplete Editor Integration : Multiple editor types referenced but not properly integrated

File System Access : Limited file operations without proper Electron integration

Terminal Backend : References localhost:3000 server that may not exist

Component Loading : Many features depend on external modules not yet loaded

Streamlined Fix Plan:
Creating a minimal, working IDE core that focuses on essential functionality first

ide-core-minimal.js
